emergency_rules.message: ⚠️ EMERGENCY: Symptoms may indicate a cardiac event. Call 108 (India) or your local emergency number immediately. Do not wait.
⚠️ EMERGENCY: Severe breathing difficulty requires immediate emergency care. Call 108 or your local emergency number now.
⚠️ EMERGENCY: Loss of consciousness requires immediate emergency response. Call 108 now and place the person in the recovery position.
⚠️ EMERGENCY: Symptoms may indicate a stroke. Use FAST (Face drooping, Arm weakness, Speech difficulty, Time to call 108). Every minute counts.
⚠️ EMERGENCY: Severe or uncontrolled bleeding requires immediate emergency care. Apply firm pressure to the wound and call 108.
⚠️ EMERGENCY: Seizures require emergency medical attention. Clear the area around the person, do not restrain them, and call 108 immediately.
⚠️ EMERGENCY: Suspected overdose or poisoning. Call the Poison Control Centre (1800-11-6117 in India) or 108 immediately. Do not induce vomiting unless instructed by medical professionals.
⚠️ CRISIS: You are not alone. Please reach out immediately: iCall India: 9152987821 | Vandrevala Foundation: 1860-2662-345 (24/7) | Or go to your nearest hospital emergency.
⚠️ EMERGENCY: Severe allergic reaction (anaphylaxis) is life-threatening. Use an EpiPen if available and call 108 immediately.

emergency_footer: ⚕️ MedMitra is not a substitute for emergency services. In a life-threatening situation, always call emergency services first.
